channel.name: PAS OUT

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Set hosnum parameter
Set Message Type and data

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg["PV1"]["PV1.3"]["PV1.3.2"].toString()" does not equal ""
Accept message if "msg["QPD"]["QPD.3"]" does not equal ""
Accept message if "msg["PV1"]["PV1.3"]["PV1.3.2"].toString()" does not equal "checkin"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: XSLT Transform Response
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
ABC NHS <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(PID.5/PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(PID.5/PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/> U
GB HOME

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg["PV1"]["PV1.3"]["PV1.3.2"].toString()" does not equal "checkin"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:variable name="vLower" select="'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'"/> <xsl:variable name="vUpper" select="'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'"/>
<xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:element name="PatientList"> </xsl:element> </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "$('d1') && $('d1').getStatus()" does not equal Status.SENT

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
